The '''Ferryboat Liner''' was a civilian light vessel in use during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], manufactured by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].<ref name="XWA" />

==Characteristics==
Built for tourists and business travelers, it was equipped with [[Cantina/Legends|drinking and dining establishments]], nightclubs, and [[Casino/Legends|casinos]]. A Ferryboat Liner could carry 500 passengers. They often hosted large banquets and parties. They were a common sight in civilian airspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
